cards.back: The process of using machines and computers to perform tasks that were previously done by humans
The loss of a job due to automation, AI, or other technological advancements
The use of technology to enhance human capabilities, rather than replace them, improving overall productivity and efficiency
The process of acquiring new skills and knowledge to remain relevant and employable in a job market with increasing automation
The process of learning new skills to adapt to changes in the job market, often required when traditional jobs become automated
